violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the beverage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the cabinets in the beverage areas have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
Inspector observed a piece of coving missing in the retail area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outdoor gated area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
Bucket and towel were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the cold food drawers have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

The floors in the walk in cooler and back food storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
